name: llms-txt-advisor
description: Evidence-based guidance for implementing, auditing, generating, or deciding on llms.txt files for websites. Includes a cold-start interview that builds a per-site practice profile, decision framework grounded in three independent empirical studies (SE Ranking n=300k, OtterlyAI 90-day logs, Search Engine Land 10-site test), templates for dev docs / marketing / e-commerce / generic sites, deployment specs (Nginx + CI validation + robots.txt consistency), and cross-cultural stakeholder communication templates in English and Turkish.
